		<script>
			// is touch device
if (isTouchDevice()) {
	jQuery('body').addClass('is-touch');
	jQuery('body').removeClass('isnt-touch');
} else {
	jQuery('body').addClass('isnt-touch');
	jQuery('body').removeClass('is-touch');
}
// is scroll
isScroll();
// navi trigger
naviTrigger();
// entry-banner
jQuery('.entry-banner__content').hover(function(){
	jQuery(this).parent('.entry-banner').addClass('is-hover');
},function(){
	jQuery(this).parent('.entry-banner').removeClass('is-hover');
});
// Initialize Lenis
const lenis = new Lenis({
  autoRaf: true,
});
//match media
let mm = gsap.matchMedia();
//inview item
const ivItems = gsap.utils.toArray('.iv-item');
ivItems.forEach(ivItem => {
	ScrollTrigger.create({
		trigger: ivItem,
		start: 'top 90%',
		toggleClass: {
			targets: ivItem,
			className: 'iv-item--active',
		},
		once: true,
	});
});
//inview item once
const ivItemsOnce = gsap.utils.toArray('.iv-item-once');
ivItemsOnce.forEach(ivItem => {
	ScrollTrigger.create({
		trigger: ivItem,
		start: 'top 90%',
		toggleClass: {
			targets: ivItem,
			className: 'iv-item-once--active',
		},
		once: true,
	});
});
//inview cover
const ivCovers = gsap.utils.toArray('.iv-cover');
ivCovers.forEach(ivCover => {
	ScrollTrigger.create({
		trigger: ivCover,
		start: 'top 90%',
		toggleClass: {
			targets: ivCover,
			className: 'iv-cover--active',
		},
		once: true,
	});
});
//deco inview
gsap.utils.toArray('.deco').forEach(deco => {
	gsap.fromTo(deco, {
		// opacity: 0,
		rotationY: 90,
	},
	{
		// opacity: .05,
		rotationY: 0,
		scrollTrigger: {
			trigger: deco,
			start: 'top bottom',
			end: 'bottom 66.666%',
			scrub: true,
		},
	});
});
//deco pararax: huge size
gsap.utils.toArray('.deco--h').forEach(deco_huge => {
	const y = deco_huge.getAttribute('data-y') || -320;
	gsap.to(deco_huge, {
		yPercent: y,
		scrollTrigger: {
			trigger: deco_huge,
			start: 'top bottom',
			end: 'bottom top',
			scrub: true,
			//markers: true,
		}
	});
});
//deco pararax: large size
gsap.utils.toArray('.deco--l').forEach(deco_large => {
	const y = deco_large.getAttribute('data-y') || -320;
	gsap.to(deco_large, {
		yPercent: y,
		scrollTrigger: {
			trigger: deco_large,
			start: 'top bottom',
			end: 'bottom top',
			scrub: true,
			//markers: true,
		}
	});
});
//deco pararax: middle size
gsap.utils.toArray('.deco--m').forEach(deco_middle => {
	const y = deco_middle.getAttribute('data-y') || -320;
	gsap.to(deco_middle, {
		yPercent: y,
		scrollTrigger: {
			trigger: deco_middle,
			start: 'top bottom',
			end: 'bottom top',
			scrub: true,
			//markers: true,
		}
	});
});
//deco pararax: small size
gsap.utils.toArray('.deco--s').forEach(deco_small => {
	const y = deco_small.getAttribute('data-y') || -320;
	gsap.to(deco_small, {
		yPercent: y,
		scrollTrigger: {
			trigger: deco_small,
			start: 'top bottom',
			end: 'bottom top',
			scrub: true,
			//markers: true,
		}
	});
});
		</script>

</script>
